Table summary.
File name: source-materials/software-notes/document-management/KBC_File_Naming_and_Folder_Guide.docx. Type of document: Document management guide. Purpose: Source for file naming and folder practices.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, all document owners. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Should finance operations adopt this naming system?.
File name: source-materials/software-notes/document-management/KBC_File_Naming_and_Folder_Guide_Rev_Oct2025.pdf. Type of document: Document management guide. Purpose: Source PDF version for file naming and folder practices.. Current status: Imported source reference. Related committee/body: Personnel Committee, all document owners. Operations Manual: Maybe. Open questions: Which version is authoritative?.
File name: source-materials/software-notes/gdoc-conversion/GDOC_CONVERSION_CHECKLIST.md. Type of document: Conversion checklist. Purpose: Source for Google Docs to DOCX conversion process.. Current status: Imported source / working note. Related committee/body: Document maintainers. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Is this still needed after source cleanup is complete?.
File name: source-materials/software-notes/gdoc-conversion/convert_gdocs.py. Type of document: Conversion utility script. Purpose: Source script for document conversion workflow.. Current status: Imported utility source. Related committee/body: Document maintainers. Operations Manual: No. Open questions: Should this be kept, updated, or archived once conversions are done?.

End of chapter: Document Inventory.
